arts.sum: Manchester United have endured an awful season under both Erik ten Hag and Ruben Amorim and summer signing Matthijs de Ligt has issued a brutal assessment of the side

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim can unleash long overdue Manchester United debutant vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim could finally give Harry Amass his senior debut when his team faces Real Sociedad in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: “I don’t think…” – Pundit makes big claim about Ruben Amorim’s Manchester United future
arts.sum: Former Liverpool and Chelsea right-back Glen Johnson has had his say on Ruben Amorim’s future as Manchester United manager. The Portuguese tactician only recently took over as Man Utd manager, replacing the struggling Erik ten Hag, but also struggling to bring about much of an improvement. arts.ttl: ‘Not such a far-fetched idea’ – Manchester United given hope of huge summer signing, key reasons suggested
arts.sum: Some days ago, Manchester United were said to be considering the possibility of making a cash plus player offer for Napoli’s Victor Osimhen. The Red Devils were said to be interested in the possibility of offering Rasmus Hojlund in their move, but there was uncertainty about Napoli’s interest in the Danish striker. arts.ttl: Antony's agent hits out at Man United's Amorim
arts.sum: Antony's agent says he "completely disagrees" with Manchester United coach Rubem Amorim's analysis that his client lacks the physicality needed to compete in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd in talks with Gotham FC over Geyse loan
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Geyse says "staying in a place where we don't feel happy is an agonising and lonely feeling".
